title: Condé Nast Article
description: Normalized representation of a Condé Nast article as derived from the brand RSS feed (RSS 2.0 + Dublin Core + Media RSS) plus the on-page schema.org NewsArticle JSON-LD block. Condé Nast does not publish an article API; this schema describes the merged, publicly observable shape.

id.description: Stable identifier — the RSS <guid> value (24-char hex content ID).

title.description: Article headline — RSS <title>, equivalent to schema.org NewsArticle.headline.

url.description: Canonical article URL on the brand site.

articleBody.description: Full article body — populated from the on-page NewsArticle.articleBody JSON-LD, not the RSS feed.

datePublished.description: RSS <pubDate>, RFC 822 in the feed; ISO 8601 in JSON-LD.

dateModified.description: Available from NewsArticle.dateModified; not present in RSS.

brand.description: Publishing brand — derived from the feed channel <title>.

edition.description: Geographic edition, e.g. 'US', 'UK', 'FR', 'IT', 'IN'. Inferred from the brand domain.

section.description: Primary site section — RSS <category> root and NewsArticle.articleSection.

categories.description: Full set of section/tag paths from RSS <category> elements (slash-separated hierarchy).

subject.description: RSS <dc:subject> — typically the column or franchise name.

keywords.description: Tag list — RSS <media:keywords> split on commas.

breadcrumb.description: Site hierarchy — schema.org BreadcrumbList block on the article page.
